description_long: This is a sleek, modern business jet airplane with a streamlined white fuselage and swept-back wings. The aircraft features two rear-mounted turbofan engines, a T-tail configuration, and a tricycle retractable landing gear, with the main gear and nose gear both visible. The fuselage is adorned with blue and black accent lines, a logo on the tail fin, and the word 'Finjet' on the side. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with multiple windows along the side for passengers. The wings are low-mounted with a slight dihedral angle and no visible winglets. The overall design suggests a high-performance, executive-class jet suitable for urban airports and private airfields.
description: A modern white business jet with swept-back low wings, rear-mounted engines, and a T-tail, featuring blue and black accents and a forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full fuselage, cockpit windows, passenger windows, open entry door, and detailed tail logo.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the twin rear-mounted engines, T-tail, and the dihedral angle of the wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the fuselage, passenger windows, tail logo, and wing structure without the open door.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the nose, cockpit windows, forward landing gear, and the full wingspan.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and a slight dihedral angle, no visible winglets.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with visible nose and main gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, likely multi-seat.
